metadata.description: Riché Zamor's agent team plugins — 4 strategic routines (Technical Architect, Analyst, User Researcher, AI Researcher) that fire via Claude Code Routines when Linear tickets transition to 'Ready for Claude routines'.

plugins.name: rz-architect
plugins.description: Technical Architect strategic routine. Produces ADRs, integration designs, architecture reviews, and tech stack evaluations in Notion. Fires on type:architect label.

plugins.name: rz-analyst
plugins.description: Analyst strategic routine. Produces competitive matrices, market analysis briefs, pricing/packaging studies, and opportunity briefs in Notion. Fires on type:analyst label.

plugins.name: rz-ux-researcher
plugins.description: User Researcher strategic routine. Produces interview synthesis, personas, journey maps, and usability audits in Notion. Fires on type:ux label.

plugins.name: rz-ai-researcher
plugins.description: AI Researcher strategic routine. Produces method evaluations, eval specs, ablation study designs, and literature reviews. Fires on type:research label. Feeds AI Engineer execution agent.
